arts.ttl: Barcelona Predicted Lineup vs. Athletic Club: La Liga
arts.sum: Marc Casado could return from injury and feature for Barcelona vs. Athletic Club in the last game of the 2024–25 La Liga season.

Athletic Club will be hoping to climb into third place in La Liga, and a win could see them leapfrog Atletico Madrid. They've already guaranteed themselves a place in the Champions League next season,...
